info.name: 47. Use Case - Anthrax
info.description:
For **complete repository for all SATUSEHAT use-cases** please access our public workspaces : [Postman Workspaces](https://s.id/PostmanSATUSEHAT) For **detailed SATUSEHAT use-cases import link** please see : [Postman Public Kemkes Link](https://link.kemkes.go.id/PostmanSATUSEHAT) Any information about SATUSEHAT FHIR Profile could be accessed through [Simplifier FHIR Profile](https://simplifier.net/guide/SATUSEHAT-FHIR-R4-Implementation-Guide/Home/FHIRProfiles?version=current) For this Folder 01. Pelayanan Rawat Jalan, there are several parameterized variables, please kindly check folder-variables as well as tests on POST (Encounter, ServiceRequest, Specimen) As well as GET (Patient, Practitioner, Location, EpisodeOfCare) Please make sure that you have inserted Org_id in your environment before testing | **Folder History** | **Editor** | **Date** | | --- | --- | --- | | Versi 1 | Raden Nurilma Hidayatullah
Anisatul 'Afifah
Supported by: CHISU | 06 Okt 2025 |

urlencoded.description: Client ID SATUSEHAT yang diberikan kepada sesuai organisasi anda
Client Secret SATUSEHAT yang diberikan kepada organisasi anda

request.description: Mekanisme untuk meng-_generate_ **client token** untuk API O-Auth2 SATUSEHAT. Setiap client token hanya berlaku (valid) dalam kurun waktu 60 menit dan setiap kegagalan request generate token akan dikenakan penalti untuk menunggu selama 1 menit.
